rationale.fidelity: Fully preserves decisions, constraints, cost objective, integer equivalence, and the relaxation-to-search mechanism.
rationale.managerial_framing: Gives the planner, trigger, stakes, implementation trade-off, matched counterfactual, and a properly conditional planning-window pathway.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: Not requested or claimed; the computational contribution is appropriately bounded.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Labels faster solving as an inference, specifies a sound paired benchmark, and rejects any lower-true-optimum interpretation.
rationale.prose_clarity: Precise and readable, if more detailed than the prompt requires.
rationale.overall: An excellent formulation-strength framing with careful evidence boundaries.
